accessKey.title: Access Key
accessKey.description: Your Renogy API Access Key. Obtain it from https://platform.renogy.com/apikey

secretKey.title: Secret Key
secretKey.description: Your Renogy API Secret Key. Obtain it from https://platform.renogy.com/apikey

layout.help: This plugin requires you to provide your Renogy API Access Key and Secret Key. You can obtain these from the Renogy developer portal at https://platform.renogy.com/apikey.
